intro: Zehneria bodinieri, also known as bodinieri's vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Zehneria bodinieri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Zehneria bodinieri is often used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
